response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrated hands-on work with agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of executive leadership at scale, regulated fintech deployment, or direct experience with multi-agent AI architectures in production financial systems — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in building event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions through testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks demonstrable experience in regulated fintech domains (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
No clear record of architecting model-agnostic, stateful multi-agent systems with feedback loops for financial decisioning
